name: έΑΜManyRequests
description:
What ManyRequests Does

ManyRequests is the "cleaner" cousin of AgencyHandy. It is widely considered the top choice for agencies moving away from "custom work" and into "subscriptions.έΑζ έΑΜIt gives you a sleek, white-labeled portal where clients can submit requests, see their files, and manage their recurring billing. ItέΑβs very popular for design and content agencies.

Source: ManyRequests

έΑΜKey Features

ΏθΠΗ White-Label Client Portal: High-end look with your own domain and logo.

ΏθΠΗ Request Management: Clients "spend" their subscription credits or hours through a ticketing system.

έΑΜΏθΠΗ Onboarding Workflows: Automated forms that trigger the moment a recurring payment is confirmed.

έΑΜBenefits of ManyRequests

έΑΜIt makes your agency look like a software company. The "Modern Portal" feel justifies higher retainers because the client feels they are getting a "premium" tech-enabled service.

έΑΜPricing

  • έΑΜStarter: $29/mo
  • έΑΜCore: $59/mo
  • έΑΜPro: $99/mo (includes full white-labeling)

There are also discounts available when choosing to bill annually.

έΑΜPros

έΑΜέεΖ Extremely polished UI/UX for the client.

έεΖ Handles "unlimited" request models perfectly.

έΑΜCons

έΑΜΏθγτ Can get expensive quickly as you add team seats.

Ώθγτ No "lead generation" or CRM tools built in.

έΑΞ
what_people_say:
έΑΜWhat Customers Say

έΑΜ"It has almost all the customization options we require, time tracking, checklists, ticketing, and feedback from our clients."

έΑΥ Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
